objective: Evaluate whether future-side decoder interfaces can improve the Phase0 selected patch encoder before adding future-aware alignment or MoE.

latest_decision.rollback_step: Step 3-5: re-evaluate whether history-only future decoder is sufficient and move to future-aware alignment.
latest_decision.next_direction: Use FixedHeadAdapter evidence as interface support, but do not treat it as the core decoder claim; next candidate should add training-only future-aware teacher/student alignment.

active_candidate.problem: History-only future segment adapter is active but not stable enough; test whether training-only future teacher supervision stabilizes the future-side interface.
active_candidate.hypothesis: A teacher branch that encodes ground-truth future only during training can align student adapter states to future distribution without inference leakage.
active_candidate.pass_condition: Leakage max abs <= 1e-7; at least 6/12 main MSE wins versus PatchEncoderFixedHead with negative mean relative MSE; alignment diagnostics must show active teacher/student coupling.

decision_boundary.phase1a: one-to-one horizon training; validates decoder-side mechanism only
decision_boundary.phase1b: one-model compatibility; run only if Phase1-A passes

remote.gpu_policy: check nvidia-smi before every run; prefer GPU 1 or 2 when memory is safe; GPU_IDS may contain one or two selected GPUs
